Standing guard for three years
[
]

Wang Lin turns the Nameless Essense Wheel Formation into a new Realm Sealing Formation to protect the Inner Realm for the agreed upon three years. During each of these years, he is accompanied by one of his female companions, Zi Xi, Red Butterfly and Mu Bingyun, who agreed to it amongst themselves.
